phone: topbar keeps menu, centered page title, and a non-clickable right spacer only
drawer keeps only chat, tianshu, hotspots, and account entries
tianshu page shows identity, animated cognitive graph, connection status, real actions, and task composer
no explanatory panels and no duplicate account buttons
wide: foldables and tablets use desktop-like three columns
left column is identity and small graph
center column is the large animated cognitive graph
right column is status, actions, tick state, and latest synced event
backgrounds: local photo background persisted on device

openBehavior.platformVideoPage: native WebView player page in app

voiceInteraction.harmonyOsFallback: if system speech recognition or TTS is unavailable, keep manual input and text responses working
voiceInteraction.note: phone speech recognition can send text to chat or desktop Agent tasks and phone TTS can read responses; desktop voice orb state is not claimed as complete
